iree_add_all_subdirs()

file(GLOB _GLOB_X_LOOM LIST_DIRECTORIES false RELATIVE ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR} CONFIGURE_DEPENDS *.loom)
iree_c_embed_data(
  NAME
    golden_text_corpus
  SRCS
    "${_GLOB_X_LOOM}"
  C_FILE_OUTPUT
    "golden_text_corpus.c"
  H_FILE_OUTPUT
    "golden_text_corpus.h"
